title: Affirm Holdings Q2 Earnings Preview - Rising Expenses
text: Affirm Holdings Q2 Earnings Preview. Earnings Outlook: Affirm is scheduled to report Q2 fiscal 2024 results on February 8, with analyst expectations showing mixed signals. The consensus estimate projects earnings of 7 cents per share, representing significant improvement from the prior-year loss of $1.10, while revenue is expected to grow 29.8% to $518.4 million. Growth Drivers: Positive factors include resilient travel and entertainment spending, expected to boost active merchants and consumers. Interest income is anticipated to surge 71.3% year-over-year to approximately $266 million, driven by pricing initiatives and the elevated interest rate environment. Headwinds: The article notes that higher operating costs and increased provision for credit losses are expected to limit profitability gains. Transaction costs are projected to reach $310-$320 million, substantially exceeding the prior-year level of $255.4 million. Additionally, gains on loan sales are expected to decline 44.7%. Beat Probability: The analysis indicates an uncertain earnings beat, with an Earnings Surprise Probability of 0.00% and a Zacks Rank of 2 (Buy). The company's historical performance shows it beat estimates in two of the last four quarters while missing twice.
